entity.summary: Global centralized cryptocurrency exchange offering spot and leveraged trading, perpetual futures, P2P services, copy trading, earn products, mobile access, and public trading APIs.
entity.notes: Current first-party platform and support material describe Hotcoin as a global cryptocurrency exchange with spot, C2C/P2P, derivatives, financial products, account services, apps, and public APIs. The platform states a 2017 founding year, but HEI does not infer the exact exchange launch date from that statement.

evidence.title: Hotcoin Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party platform introduction identifies Hotcoin as a global cryptocurrency exchange and describes spot, C2C, derivatives, crypto-finance, and related exchange services.

evidence.title: Hotcoin API Documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party API documentation provides spot/leverage, perpetual-futures, market-data, account, and WebSocket interfaces.

evidence.title: Hotcoin official trading platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange website exposes markets, spot trading, futures, P2P services, earn products, mobile access, and API entry points.
